title: Graphify + Obsidian + Claude Code = CHEAT CODE
summary: A demonstration video showcasing how Graphify, Obsidian, and Claude Code can be combined to improve knowledge graph insights and enhance AI-assisted code generation. The workflow involves using Graphify to deconstruct repositories, organizing insights in Obsidian, and feeding structured knowledge to Claude Code for better outputs.
writeup: The video demonstrates a workflow that combines three tools: Graphify, Obsidian, and Claude Code. Graphify deconstructs repositories into knowledge graph insights, Obsidian organizes those insights, and the structured knowledge then feeds into Claude Code to improve code generation. The takeaway is that pairing codebase analysis and a knowledge graph with an AI coding assistant produces better outputs than prompting the model alone.
